author: lee101
title: Multi-issue: fail-open persistence, split-brain batch, _plan boundary, guardrail, make_lang_run aliasing, phase drift, config clobber, TS re-scan
notes: 8-issue submission from codex-infinity.com agent. Most claims are structurally confirmed but individually shallow: (1) fail-open persistence to empty_state is confirmed but has backup recovery and logging; (2) split-brain batch reporters confirmed — _build_progress_reporter closure and BatchProgressTracker are near-duplicates; (3) _plan import violations confirmed — 3 app-layer files import from engine._plan directly; (4) guardrail fail-open confirmed with broad PLAN_LOAD_EXCEPTIONS; (5) make_lang_run aliasing confirmed; (6) phase drift partially confirmed (min_loc differs); (7) config {} fallback confirmed; (8) TS detector re-scan confirmed. Several overlap with earlier submissions (S003 config, S006 plan persistence). Self-described as WIP agent output. Breadth over depth.
